text.title: AI Governance and Compliance Decision Tree

root-question.text: What is the EU AI Act risk class of this system?

branch.conclusion: Refuse deployment. Prohibited class requires legal exit or scope change, not a governance pack.

question.text: Is human oversight architecturally possible (queue + reviewer + reversal window)?

branch.conclusion: Ship full pack: model card + bias audit + explainability + oversight + audit log (7+y retention).
Escalate — high-risk without oversight design is non-compliant. Re-architect or de-risk.
Ship abbreviated pack: model card + transparency disclosure + audit log (3+y retention).
Ship minimal pack: model card only.

example.p: risk_class=high (recruitment Annex III) → oversight_possible=true (HR-lead reviewer + 24h reversal) → conclusion: ship-full-pack.
